chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Maintaining Relations with the Imams as

text: 1764 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «دِرْهَمٌ يُوصَلُ بِهِ اَلْإِمَامُ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ أَلْفِ أَلْفِ دِرْهَمٍ يُنْفَقُ فِي غَيْرِهِ فِي سَبِيلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.1764 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said: "A dirham given to support the Imam is better than a million dirhams spent on others in the way of Allah (swt), the Almighty."
